name: Dorothy Weldon
quote: Artem is an incredible artist and did a spectacular job on my first tattoo. He gave a small piece so much care and attention and it is holding up perfectly.

name: Brett Franklin
quote: Flew in from Arizona to go to Artem. Before deciding on an artist, I did consultations with a bunch (including BangBang which was awful) and it was clear Artem cared enough to make sure I got exactly what I wanted. We went back and forth on the design before deciding on the final piece and it came out better than I thought possible. I’ll be back to Artem if I decide to get any more in the future and will recommend him to all my friends.

name: Yana Kanatyeva
quote: I got my third tattoo from Artem on Saturday and I don’t want to stop. Artem is a very talented tattoo artist. He listens carefully to his clients wishes, always makes sure the tattoo will look good on the body in terms of placement and size, and the result always exceeds expectations. I highly recommend him whether you’re looking for something small or you have a bigger project in mind.

name: Lisa Arnold
quote: Artem is INCREDIBLE. He does excellent detailed work and he can do anything big or small. His studio is beautiful, clean and he is impeccable in his work style and attention to detail. I HIGHLY recommend him to anyone for a first or another tattoo!

name: Lea Sciancalepore
quote: Artem is an incredible artist and his designs are amazing! I have had a great experience with him both times I have gone. He is easy to work with, very kind, helpful, and professional and makes you feel comfortable. I am so happy with my tattoo and can’t wait to go back again soon!!!

name: Pitak Liang
quote: Highly recommend Artem. Super easy and accommodating to work with. I had trouble locating his studio the day-of but he was quick to communicate & met up with me. The tattoo itself also came out (and still remains) beautiful. If you're reading through reviews because you're on the fence about Artem as your artist, go for it!

name: Kyler Fritz
quote: Absolutely thrilled with my tattoo experience with Artem! Their skillful artistry brought my vision to life with precision and creativity. From the initial consultation to the final product, the process was smooth and professional. The studio's ambiance was inviting and clean, making for a comfortable session. Not only did they exceed my expectations in design execution, but their attention to detail and commitment to hygiene reassured me throughout. I highly recommend Blackwork NYC for anyone seeking exceptional quality and a memorable tattoo experience!
